info.title: templateversions
info.description: Lists all the versions of dotnet core SDKs in your user template directory and the global tools for each version.

options.name: --sdkversion
options.description: The dotnet SDK version to check for. IE: v2.2.401

options.name: --list
options.description: List SDK version in .templateengine directory and exit.

options.name: --all
options.description: List all templates across all your installed SDKs.

options.name: --noversionall
options.description: Like --all, except removes SDK versions and orders the ouput.
